text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost last time... But this one I'll win for
sure!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I'm not giving anyone the chance to
look down on me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll put on an amazing display, take first place...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And show them all I can do it!
